title: marlea chinensis
intro: Marlea chinensis, also known as Chinese Marlea or Chinese Marigold, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Rutaceae. The medicinal properties of Marlea chinensis lie in its essential oils, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Marlea chinensis include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory issues. Marlea chinensis is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote digestive health and relieve stress.
